title: equiv_make is confused by feedback through module port

features.name: feedback_through_DFF_output_to_MUX
features.description: Code should include a feedback loop where DFF output feeds back through MUX to DFF input

features.name: dff_to_dffe_conversion_with_enable
features.description: Code should include equivalent designs where one uses $_DFF_P_ and another uses $_DFFE_PP_ with enable gating

features.name: module_output_as_feedback_node
features.description: Code should include a module output port connected to an internal wire that participates in feedback computation

features.name: mux_select_between_feedback_and_input
features.description: Code should include a MUX that selects between DFF output and new input based on select signal
